title: Star Wars Galaxies: The Complete Online Adventures
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|italics=1}} {{VideoGame |image=[[File:CompleteonlineSWG.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Galaxies:
The Complete Online Adventures'' |developer=[[Sony]] Online Entertainment{{SonyCite|url=players/news_archive.vm?id=67080&month=112006|text=''Star Wars'' Galaxies® : The Complete Online Adventures Ships To Stores}} |publisher=[[LucasArts]] |release date=[[November 14]], [[2006]] |closed= |upc= |engine= |genre=[[Star Wars video games#Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|MMORPG]] |modes= |ratings= |platforms=[[Wikipedia:Microsoft Windows|Microsoft Windows]] |series= |basegame=[[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']] |expansions= |director= |producer= |designer= |programmer= |artist= |writer= |composer= |timeline= |prev= |next= }} '''''Star Wars Galaxies: The Complete Online Adventures''''' is a compilation release of the [[Star Wars video games#Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online role-playing game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']]. It was released on [[November 16]], [[2006]]. It includes the base game, ''An Empire Divided'', along with all three expansion packs, [[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed|''Jump to Lightspeed'']], [[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees|''Rage of the Wookiees'']], and [[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan|''Trials of Obi-Wan'']], and a [[Star Wars Galaxies Bonus DVD|behind-the-scenes DVD]] featuring developer interviews, concept art and various images and videos from the development of the game. As in the previous compilations, it includes an exclusive in-game item, this time an [[All Terrain Recon Transport/Legends|AT-RT]] vehicle as seen in [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']]. Since November 2009, a handful of extra in-game items are also awarded to purchasers of this compilation: #A Royal Ship Instant Travel Vehicle #A Tsmeu-6 Personal Wheel Bike #A Mustafarian Underground Bunker #A Varactyl Mount #A Lava Flea Mount ==Sources== *{{SWArchive|url=gaming/videogames/news/news20061114.html|text=Now Available: ''Star Wars'' Galaxies: The Complete Adventures}} *{{SonyCite|url=players/news_archive.vm?id=67080&month=112006|text=''Star Wars'' Galaxies® : The Complete Online Adventures Ships To Stores}} *{{SonyCite|url=players/news_archive.vm?id=67696&month=042008|text=Complete Online Adventures Premium Download in the Station Store!}} *{{SonyCite|url=players/news_archive.vm?id=68636&month=022010|text=The ''Star Wars'' Galaxies™: The Complete Online Adventures Premium Plus Pack Update!}} *{{SonyCite|url=players/news_archive.vm?id=68854&month=072010|text=''Star Wars'' Galaxies Complete Online Adventures Sale on Steam}} *{{SonyCite|url=players/news_archive.vm?id=68930&month=092010|text=The Complete Online Adventures Premium Plus Pack on Sale on Direct2Drive}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=62962|text=''Star Wars'' Galaxies™: The Complete Online Adventures}} {{GalaxiesNav}} {{Interlang |pt=Star Wars Galaxies: The Complete Online Adventures }} [[Category:Star Wars Galaxies expansion packs]] [[Category:Video game compilations]]
